name: Crypto Regime Signals
description: Pay-per-call crypto market-regime signals for AI agents. Classifies the live market regime (trend + volatility + a 0-100 quick-score) for major pairs from real Kraken data, served over the x402 protocol in USDC with no API keys. Every regime read is committed on-chain (RegimeOracle) and to a public hash-chain, giving a tamper-evident, queryable track record any agent can verify before paying.
